summary: Ad Tribe app where users land directly on the main app (skipping onboarding modal) and register themselves to access further information. Supports Director and Production House registration flows.
architectural_notes: Onboarding modal (Welcome/name entry step) has been removed; users land directly on the main app
Users self-register from the main app to access Director or Production House information

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Welcome to Ad Tribe' onboarding modal (ProfileSetup component in frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx) entirely. Users must no longer be prompted to enter their name upon authentication — they should land directly on the main app without any interstitial modal or name-entry step.
